Distribution Revenue Management Digital Marketing Projects
Commercial services for independent hotels

Indi is the commercial team behind high‑performing independent hotels.

You stay focused on your guests. We run your distribution, revenue management and digital marketing, growing your revenue and your direct bookings.

Start your free discovery See how we work

Independent hotels, performing better

The opportunity

Imagine your commercials in expert hands.

You've built something independent, with its own character, run your way. What most owners never get is a full commercial team behind it, the people who live and breathe distribution, pricing and marketing every day. That's what Indi brings, specialists dedicated to your revenue, so the property performs at its best while you stay focused on your guests.

Smarter acquisition

Keep more of every booking working for you.

Pricing that moves with the market

Capture demand as it happens, day to day.

One team, pulling together

Distribution, marketing and web working as one.

Clarity on your upside

See exactly where the growth is, and go after it.

What we do

One team for everything that drives your revenue.

Indi brings your distribution, revenue management and marketing under one roof, coordinated, not stitched together. And when you need just one thing done, we take on standalone projects too.

Electronic Distribution

Your channels and OTAs set up and optimised, connected cleanly to your systems, so you're visible everywhere that matters.

Explore

Revenue Management

Best-practice pricing, rate plans and segmentation that move with demand, so you capture more of it.

Explore

Digital Marketing

A booking-ready website, professional photography and direct-booking campaigns that turn lookers into direct bookings.

Explore
Projects

A different way to buy: standalone projects.

A new website, GDS activation, a PMS setup or dynamic pricing. One-off, fixed scope, delivered by the same expert team.

Explore
How it works

A clear path, from first look to ongoing partnership.

01

Free discovery

A free look across your distribution, revenue and marketing, with practical ideas to help your hotel perform at its best.

02

Onboarding

We build and put in place a bespoke commercial strategy, built around your property.

03

Ongoing partnership

We keep it running and improving, at the level of support that fits you.

See how we work in detail
Your level of support

Choose your level of support.

Every property is different, so support is too. The difference between tiers isn't how often we talk, it's how much of the day-to-day commercial work you'd like us to run.

Weekly

Your outsourced commercial team, Indi-led

Larger or complex properties, repositionings, and demand that moves fast.

Most popular Monthly

Active management, shared

Most midscale properties wanting real momentum.

Quarterly

Strategic oversight, owner-led

Hands-on owners and steady demand.

Quarterly is strategic oversight rather than active day-to-day pricing. The more of the execution you hand to Indi, the more of the upside we can help you capture.

All partnerships run on a minimum 12-month term.

Start your free discovery
In their words

Owners, talking about Indi.

"I love being independent, but with the support of Indi Hotels in the background."

Andrew Macdonald · Owner · Hotel Nelson

"The website Indi Hotels provided is brilliant. It currently delivers two bookings for every OTA booking."

Lawrence Heasman · Group GM · City Apartment Hotel Group

"I couldn't have asked for a better partner than Indi."

Michael Stephens · Owner · Albany Motel & Apartments
